---
title: "Vegetation Data Transformation & Classification"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  project_id: "PROJECT_ID"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

## Load clean data and reference tables

```{r load}
veg <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_veg_clean.rds")))
load(here("data", "wetland_indicator_status.rda"))
load(here("data", "anpc_wetland_species.rda"))
load(here("data", "invasive_species.rda"))
load(here("data", "noxious_weeds.rda"))
load(here("data", "wair_rules.rda"))
load(here("data", "ecosites_nfc.rda"))
```

## Join wetland indicator status (UPL–OBL)

```{r join-wi-status}
veg <- veg |>
  left_join(wetland_indicator_status |> select(species_code, wi_status, wi_status_label),
            by = "species_code")
```

## Join invasive / noxious flags

```{r join-invasive}
veg <- veg |>
  left_join(invasive_species |> select(species_code, is_invasive = invasive),
            by = "species_code") |>
  left_join(noxious_weeds   |> select(species_code, is_noxious  = noxious),
            by = "species_code") |>
  mutate(
    is_invasive = replace_na(is_invasive, FALSE),
    is_noxious  = replace_na(is_noxious,  FALSE)
  )
```

## Calculate UPL–OBL proportions per plot (WAIR methodology)

```{r upl-obl}
# Weighted by % cover; OBL + FACW + FAC grouped as wetland indicators
wi_order <- c("OBL", "FACW", "FAC", "FACU", "UPL")

plot_wi <- veg |>
  group_by(plot_id) |>
  summarise(
    total_cover         = sum(cover_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    obl_facw_fac_cover  = sum(cover_pct[wi_status %in% c("OBL","FACW","FAC")], na.rm = TRUE),
    obl_cover           = sum(cover_pct[wi_status == "OBL"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    pct_wetland_indicator = obl_facw_fac_cover / total_cover,
    dominant_wi_class     = case_when(
      pct_wetland_indicator >= 0.50 ~ "Hydrophytic",
      pct_wetland_indicator >= 0.33 ~ "Marginal",
      TRUE                          ~ "Non-hydrophytic"
    )
  )

plot_wi
```

## Classify plots into ANPC wetland class (WAIR rules)

```{r classify}
# TODO: implement WAIR decision tree using wair_rules reference table
# Placeholder structure:
plot_classification <- plot_wi |>
  mutate(
    wetland_class = NA_character_  # to be populated from wair_rules
  )
```

## Classify plots into NFC ecosites

```{r ecosite}
# TODO: cross-reference dominant species assemblage with ecosites_nfc
```

## Save transformed data

```{r save}
saveRDS(veg,                 here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_veg_transformed.rds")))
saveRDS(plot_wi,             here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_plot_wi.rds")))
saveRDS(plot_classification, here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_plot_class.rds")))
```
